texto: If you look around you at the physical universe, you will see that it's nature is growth. Everything from the cells in your body to the planets orbiting the sun are constantly growing, constantly changing, constantly evolving. Nothing stays still. Nothing remains the same. So think about it - why would your life be the exception? Why would you be the only thing that exists in all of creation whose purpose isn't to grow?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Barbara De Angelis que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Everyth…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, changing, evolving, com foco em evolving e growth.
